    <p>{`The Watson Assistant web chat widget has a feature to display an embedded iframe as a hyperlink, which then expands once clicked upon to display any given map.  The default map chosen for the asset is Google Maps.  `}</p>
    <p>{`In order to use the same dialog node as is, you must obtain your own Google API Key and update the node “Map Office By Zip Code”.`}</p>

      <li parentName="ol">{`Update the context variable `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`mapApiKey`}</inlineCode>{` with the API key you obtained from the first step.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Optionally, update the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`mapQuery`}</inlineCode>{` context variable as required.  The default map query is `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Department+Social+Services`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
